reviews.comment:
Excelente gastronomía, el lugar para parar en la ruta 2 (hay de todo rico, para desayunar o merendar y tb para almorzar, gran calidad y buen precio; el premio -imperdible- es para el matambre casero, el mejor que he probado, unos capos)

(Translated by Google)
Excellent food, the perfect place to stop on Route 2 (they have everything delicious, for breakfast or afternoon tea and also for lunch, great quality and good price; the prize -unmissable- is for the homemade matambre, the best I've ever tasted, they're masters)
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJV05tWkhtNXN5RDZBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Parada obligada yendo y volviendo. Excelente parador detrás de la estación donde podes parar a almorzar bajo los árboles. Hay una plaza para los chicos.

(Translated by Google)
A must-stop on both the way there and back. Excellent rest stop behind the station where you can stop for lunch under the trees. There's a playground for children.
